sys_ux_page_property.name: chrome_footer

sys_update_version.name: sys_ux_page_property_5cf6ca41ea610b140803b315dd0070e1
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_ux_page_property"><sys_ux_page_property action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><choices/><description/><name>chrome_footer</name><page display_value="">10f6ca417a610b1421cfcdec3f4884bd</page><required_translations>[]</required_translations><route/><suffix/><sys_class_name>sys_ux_page_property</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-16 15:10:04</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>5cf6ca41ea610b140803b315dd0070e1</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>chrome_footer</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Automated Network Request Management" source="x_1877518_automa_0">0ab1faa447e50714e9a5d369316d4347</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Automated Network Request Management">0ab1faa447e50714e9a5d369316d4347</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_ux_page_property_5cf6ca41ea610b140803b315dd0070e1</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-16 15:10:04</sys_updated_on><type>json</type><unique_name>x_1877518_automa_0.10f6ca417a610b1421cfcdec3f4884bd.root.chrome_footer</unique_name><value>{
    "public_page":{
       "enable_footer_topbar":false,
       "footer_topbar_options":{
          "enable_logo":false,
          "enable_address": false,
          "enable_linkset_group":false,
          "max_linkset_count":0
       },
       "enable_footer_bar":true,
       "footer_bar_options":{
          "enable_links":true,
          "max_links_count":5,
          "enable_social_links":false,
          "max_social_links_count":7,
          "social_links":[],
          "enable_copyright_text":true,
          "copyright_text":"© 2026 Company Inc. All rights reserved."
       }
    }
 }</value></sys_ux_page_property></record_update>
